branches.name: plus
branches.changelog:
v1.6.0 (plus)

Global:
- Added turkish localization (thanks to [BLUEStrike5K](https://www.youtube.com/@BLUEStrike5K/featured))

Linux:
- **Upgraded gcc from 4.8 to 9**
- Added updater support (going to publish later)
- Added TrackerUI (friends) support
- Added custom master server support
- Implemented SDL2 surface backend for VGUI2
- Enabled Discord Rich Presence
- Fixed stack smashing in font texture cache
- Fixed memory issues in `CLinuxFont`

Engine:
- Added `-picmip` launch argument to restore gl_picmip functionality
- Added PNG backgrounds (again, resource/background.png)
- Implemented SDR (Steam Datagram Relay) networking from HL25
- Implemented `cl_ticket_generator` (from [Xash3D FWGS](https://github.com/FWGS/xash3d-fwgs))
**NOTE: you still need to own GoldSrc game you want to play.**
- Extended GSX API with `ConsoleColorPrintf` and `DrawSetTextColor`
- Reimplemented GSX API as an interface (was a struct)
- Made client CRC check exclusive for Win32
- config.cfg read-only flag is no longer bypassed
- Removed TGA texture resolution limit for VGUI2
- Fixed some EAX reverb related bugs
- Fixed lightgamma crash in multiplayer
- Fixed `R_DrawTorus` buffer overrun
- Fixed non-thread-safe console prints in MP3 system
- Fixed parsing of `Half-Life_gsx` directory
- Fixed game window icon orientation (no longer flipped)
- Fixed several Steam RPC issues
- Fixed listen server advertising in Steam masterserver
- Fixed game crash when WinSock error appears
- Software: Fixed GameUI background gap on the left side
- Software: Fixed animated logo scaling
- Software: implemented drawing funcs for ServerBrowser flags

GameUI:
- Added `gsx_nohdproportional` cvar (replaces `-nohdproportional` launch argument)
- Added animated logo from HL25
- Enabled bots dialog for Counter-Strike (still requires ReGameDLL)
- Reworked launch arguments into a dedicated GSX options dialog (GSX / UI / Renderer / About tabs, STILL WIP)
- Most GSX options are now applied dynamically via cvars
- Applied HD proportional scaling to CareerUI

TrackerUI:
- Added in-game friends/Tracker UI (thanks to @oxiKKK)

ServerBrowser:
- Added custom masterservers support
- Fixed being unable to copy server's IP
- Fixed server queries after game restart

VGUI2:
- Finalized HL25 menu (help text, sounds, additive text draw)
- Fixed new/delete type mismatch in `ListPanel::DeleteAllItems`
- Fixed UP direction for system menu
